releaseTruth: Industry specialization is a production blueprint for Chapters 3-6. It is not selectable or playable in the current alpha.
designIntent: Let the founder turn one credible job-shop foundation into a personally meaningful manufacturing powerhouse without splitting the early teaching game into unrelated campaigns.

commonFoundation.rule: Every founder learns the common factory language before choosing a sector. No path changes the family-friendly Chapter 1-2 difficulty or skips a competency gate.

choiceTimeline.playerAction: Complete pilot contracts from at least three sectors and compare enjoyment, margin, process fit, risk, workforce, and facility needs.
Choose a primary market division after Zach's market-fit review and a visible capital plan.
choiceTimeline.commitment: primary specialization selected; adjacent work remains available

choiceTimeline.playerAction: Build sector-specific departments, qualifications, supplier controls, and major-subassembly capability.
choiceTimeline.commitment: primary reputation and contract chain deepen

choiceTimeline.playerAction: Operate as a specialist supplier, systems integrator, or original-equipment manufacturer and complete the capstone.

portfolioRules.primaryDivision: One primary path controls the main customer arc, signature facility modules, capstone, and ending.
portfolioRules.adjacentWork: Compatible contracts from other sectors remain available when equipment, qualifications, capacity, and risk controls fit.
portfolioRules.pivoting: The primary division may change once before the Chapter 5 scale investment, with visible retraining, requalification, relationship, and capital consequences.
portfolioRules.difficulty: Paths change decisions and process emphasis, not basic control difficulty or hidden statistical penalties.
portfolioRules.noFalseScale: Early chapters make components and fixtures. Complete vehicles, aircraft, launch stages, and complex systems appear only after the company has credible facilities, staff, suppliers, systems, and capital.

specializations.founderFantasy: Grow from precision brackets and tooling into flight-critical assemblies and a major aircraft program.
specializations.capstone: Deliver a complete traceable aircraft shipset, then choose elite supplier growth or a prototype aircraft integration program.
specializations.visualIdentity: aerospace blue, titanium gray, clean assembly fixtures, riveted airframe forms

specializations.founderFantasy: Turn difficult prototype work into reliable propulsion, structure, and orbital-hardware production.
specializations.capstone: Manufacture and prove a traceable launch-stage or orbital-platform shipset through test, recovery, and customer acceptance.
specializations.visualIdentity: deep navy, white thermal surfaces, copper accents, cylindrical tanks and test stands

specializations.founderFantasy: Scale from prototype vehicle parts into repeatable production and a complete specialty vehicle line.
specializations.capstone: Launch a commercial or specialty electric vehicle while holding quality, delivery, warranty, and supplier performance.
specializations.visualIdentity: performance red, graphite, bright line markings, body fixtures and moving assembly carriers

specializations.founderFantasy: Build the machines that help other factories move, inspect, assemble, and recover safely.
specializations.capstone: Build and support a complete automated line without hiding safety, quality, or maintainability problems.
specializations.visualIdentity: electric cyan, safety amber, cable trays, test cages and animated material flow

specializations.founderFantasy: Advance from rugged precision parts into machines and skids that generate, store, and move energy.
specializations.capstone: Commission a modular power system that meets pressure, performance, documentation, and uptime commitments.
specializations.visualIdentity: power green, copper, dark steel, pipe skids, rotors and heavy lifting systems

specializations.founderFantasy: Make small, exact, fully documented products that improve lives and cannot tolerate careless shortcuts.
specializations.capstone: Validate and launch a precision device family with clean records, controlled processes, and no unresolved patient-risk escapes.
specializations.visualIdentity: clean white, medical teal, brushed stainless, magnified parts and controlled work cells

specializations.founderFantasy: Build durable machines that work in dirt, weather, mines, farms, and construction sites for years.
specializations.capstone: Launch a durable specialty machine through accelerated life testing, field service, and a peak-season ramp.
specializations.visualIdentity: construction yellow, forest green, heavy plate, overhead cranes and outdoor test areas

specializations.founderFantasy: Transform a clever hardware idea into an affordable, repairable product used by thousands of people.
specializations.capstone: Launch and support a recognizable durable product family while balancing cost, quality, repairability, demand, and trust.
specializations.visualIdentity: bold product colors, warm steel, packaging lines, test labs and recognizable finished goods
